title: portulaca hortensis
intro: Portulaca hortensis, also known as garden purslane or common purslane, is a succulent annual plant with small, round, and fleshy leaves, commonly found in gardens and along roadsides. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Portulaca hortensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Portulaca hortensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
